tasks.subject: Task 1: Theme preference module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure src/theme/theme.ts (load/save/resolve theme preference; resolve auto via matchMedia) — twin of src/i18n/language.ts.

**Files:** Create src/theme/theme.ts; Test src/theme/theme.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** THEME_STORAGE_KEY='sts2mm-theme', DEFAULT='dark'; isSupportedThemePreference validates dark/light/auto; load falls back to dark; save never throws; resolve auto via matchMedia + prefersLight guard; applyTheme sets data-theme.

**Verify:** npx vitest run src/theme/theme.test.ts

**Steps:** TDD; full code in plan Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/theme/theme.ts", "src/theme/theme.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/theme/theme.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["storage key + default dark", "isSupportedThemePreference validates", "load falls back to dark", "save never throws", "resolve auto via matchMedia", "applyTheme sets data-theme"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: ThemeProvider, no-flash startup, test plumbing
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ThemeProvider/useTheme applying+persisting theme and following OS while auto; wire App.tsx; no-flash index.html script; matchMedia mock in setup.ts; ThemeProvider in AllProviders.

**Files:** Create src/theme/ThemeContext.tsx, src/theme/ThemeContext.test.tsx; Modify src/App.tsx, index.html, src/__test__/setup.ts, src/__test__/providers.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:** default dark applies data-theme; setPreference('light') persists+applies; auto follows matchMedia change; useTheme throws outside provider; index.html sets data-theme pre-paint; full suite green.

**Verify:** npx vitest run src/theme/ThemeContext.test.tsx && npx vitest run

**Steps:** TDD; full code in plan Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/theme/ThemeContext.tsx", "src/theme/ThemeContext.test.tsx", "src/App.tsx", "index.html", "src/__test__/setup.ts", "src/__test__/providers.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/theme/ThemeContext.test.tsx && npx vitest run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["default dark applies data-theme", "manual light persists+applies", "auto follows matchMedia", "useTheme throws outside provider", "index.html pre-paint", "full suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: CSS token architecture + reactive color-scheme
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Scope existing tokens under :root[data-theme=dark]; add :root[data-theme=light] seed (=dark); drive color-scheme from --app-color-scheme; set accent-color. Dark unchanged.

**Files:** Modify src/styles.css (blocks :8-64; color-scheme :37, :1519, :2416)

**Acceptance Criteria:** raw tokens under [data-theme=dark] identical; light block seeded same names; @theme --color-* overridden both blocks; --app-color-scheme drives all 3 color-scheme spots; accent-color: var(--gf); dark identical + build clean.

**Verify:** npm run build

**Steps:** full code in plan Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/styles.css"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dark tokens scoped", "light block seeded", "@theme overridden per block", "color-scheme reactive at 3 spots", "accent-color set", "dark identical + build clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Expand token set + migrate styles.css literals
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace ~154 oklch/themeable-hex literals in styles.css with semantic tokens; add tint/line/text triples, info family, scrims. Dark identical.

**Files:** Modify src/styles.css

**Acceptance Criteria:** new tokens in both blocks; grep oklch styles.css = 0; only allowlisted brand hex remains, #f59e0b->var(--warn); dark value invariant; build clean + vitest green.

**Verify:** grep -nE 'oklch\\(' src/styles.css | wc -l  -> 0

**Steps:** mapping table + one-off color-mix rule in plan Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/styles.css"], "verifyCommand": "grep -nE 'oklch\\(' src/styles.css | wc -l", "acceptanceCriteria": ["new semantic tokens both blocks", "zero oklch in styles.css", "only brand hex remains", "dark invariant", "build + vitest pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Migrate inline component colors
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace ~40 inline oklch/hex in JSX style props across ~12 components with var(--token); layout untouched.

**Files:** Modify src/views/Browse.tsx, src/views/Settings.tsx, src/contexts/ToastContext.tsx, src/components/{AutoDetectModal,BrowseDetail,ConfirmDialog,LibraryRow,OnboardingOverlay,ProfileSwitcher,PublishModal,QuickAddModal,SourceEditor}.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:** grep oklch tsx = 0; callout pattern tokenized; themeable hex tokenized; vitest green + build clean.

**Verify:** grep -rnE 'oklch\\(' src --include=*.tsx | wc -l  -> 0

**Steps:** worked examples (ConfirmDialog, PublishModal) + mapping in plan Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/views/Browse.tsx", "src/views/Settings.tsx", "src/contexts/ToastContext.tsx", "src/components/AutoDetectModal.tsx", "src/components/BrowseDetail.tsx", "src/components/ConfirmDialog.tsx", "src/components/LibraryRow.tsx", "src/components/OnboardingOverlay.tsx", "src/components/ProfileSwitcher.tsx", "src/components/PublishModal.tsx", "src/components/QuickAddModal.tsx", "src/components/SourceEditor.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "grep -rnE 'oklch\\(' src --include=*.tsx | wc -l", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zero oklch in tsx", "callout pattern tokenized", "themeable hex tokenized", "vitest + build pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Author the light palette
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace seeded dark values in :root[data-theme=light] with a hand-tuned light palette for every token; visual QA each screen in light.

**Files:** Modify src/styles.css (light block only)

**Acceptance Criteria:** every light token purpose-chosen (off-white surfaces, near-black text, darkened accents, unchanged scrims); no dark/illegible element in light; dark unaffected; build clean + vitest green.

**Verify:** npm run build; visual QA via npm run dev with sts2mm-theme=light.

**Steps:** full light block in plan Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/styles.css"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["every light token tuned", "no dark/illegible in light", "dark unaffected", "build + vitest pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Theme toggle in Settings (UI + i18n)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ThemeSelect dropdown (Auto/Dark/Light) in Settings -> General next to the Language card; i18n keys both locales.

**Files:** Create src/components/ThemeSelect.tsx, src/components/ThemeSelect.test.tsx; Modify src/i18n/locales/en.json, src/i18n/locales/zh-Hans.json, src/views/Settings.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:** settings.theme.{label,dark,light,auto} both locales, qa:i18n passes; ThemeSelect renders/persists/applies/guards via useTheme; Card after Language card; vitest + build pass.

**Verify:** npm run qa:i18n && npx vitest run src/components/ThemeSelect.test.tsx

**Steps:** keys after settings.language (line 1104); TDD; mirror LanguageSelect; full code in plan Task 7.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/ThemeSelect.tsx", "src/components/ThemeSelect.test.tsx", "src/i18n/locales/en.json", "src/i18n/locales/zh-Hans.json", "src/views/Settings.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run qa:i18n && npx vitest run src/components/ThemeSelect.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 theme keys both locales parity passes", "ThemeSelect renders/persists/applies/guards", "Card after Language card", "vitest + build pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Definition-of-Done verification + screenshots + PR
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Requested by the user in this conversation. MUST NOT be closed by walking around it, declaring it verified inline, or substituting a cheaper check. Close only after every acceptanceCriteria item is independently re-validated with captured output, incl. before/after screenshots in BOTH dark and light.

**Goal:** Verify the feature meets Definition of Done and open the PR.

**Files:** none (verification + PR).

**Acceptance Criteria:** qa:unit passes (captured); qa:i18n passes (captured); build clean (captured); grep oklch sweep across styles.css + tsx = 0; LIGHT renders correctly on Home/Library/Modpacks/Browse/Settings/modal (screenshots); DARK still correct (screenshots); native controls verified in light (selects/checkboxes/inputs/scrollbar); PR opened with before/after screenshots both themes.

**Verify:** npm run qa:unit && npm run qa:i18n && npm run build; screenshots in dark AND light; PR created.

**Steps:** run gates + greps; visual QA both themes + native controls; push; gh pr create with screenshots + spec link.

```json:metadata
{"userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["dark"], ["light"]], "files": [], "verifyCommand": "npm run qa:unit && npm run qa:i18n && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["qa:unit passes captured", "qa:i18n passes captured", "build clean captured", "grep oklch sweep 0", "light correct on 6 surfaces screenshots", "dark still correct screenshots", "native controls verified in light", "PR with before/after both themes"]}
```
